title: Mylloon's modpack
description: Mods I use to have the best "vanilla" experience of Minecraft
body:
# Myllon's modpack

## Teardown of the mods used, with all of the source link to original project

- [QFAPI]()
   - This is a requirement for the Quilt loader.

---
- [Sodium](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric)
   - Heavily optimize the game.
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://github.com/fxmorin/MemoryLeakFix)
   - Resolve a type of bug in Minecraft, without affecting the gameplay.
- [Krypton](https://github.com/astei/krypton)
   - Improves the network part of the game.
- [EntityCulling](https://github.com/tr7zw/EntityCulling)
   - Prevents the game to render entity not seen by the player.
- [LazyDFU](https://github.com/astei/lazydfu)
   - Improves the starting time of the game.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://github.com/juliand665/Dynamic-FPS)
   - Slow down the game when in background, so you can let the game open for the afk farm.
- [Starlight](https://github.com/PaperMC/Starlight)
   - A rewrite of lighting, which is better than the original in term of performance.
- [Lithium](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/lithium-fabric)
   - Optimize the game.

---
- [Iris shaders](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris)
   - Allows you to add shaders to the game.
- [Complementary shaders](https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryShadersV4)
   - Pretty and performant shader.

---
- [EMI](https://github.com/emilyploszaj/emi/)
   - Item and recipe viewer.
- [Fabrishot](https://github.com/ramidzkh/fabrishot)
   - Take high resolution screenshots.
- [Bobby](https://github.com/Johni0702/bobby)
   - Increase render distance in multiplayer games.
- [WI Zoom](https://github.com/Wurst-Imperium/WI-Zoom)
   - Zoom

## Info

Thanks for using this modpack.
